title: ego lite: I gave Claude Code & Codex a browser to run web automation — here's what happened
summary: ego lite is a Chromium-based browser that provides isolated workspaces for AI agents to perform web automation and workflows. It allows agents like Claude, Codex, and Cursor to operate within separate browser contexts while maintaining the user's normal browsing without interference.
